Phase-11.NAME: Frontend Security and Quality (P3)
Phase-11.goal: Harden frontend auth storage and improve TypeScript quality.
Phase-11.step-1: M-009/M-010: Add httpOnly secure cookies to auth endpoints.
Phase-11.step-3: M-010: Eliminate 53 any usages in admin frontend with 18 typed interfaces.
Phase-11.step-4: M-010: Migrate react-query v3 to TanStack Query v5.
Phase-11.step-5: M-009: Fix PWA cache regex for relative /api/ paths.
Phase-11.step-7: M-009: Fix i18next escapeValue to prevent XSS.
Phase-11.step-8: M-010: Add refresh token interceptor to admin frontend.
